name: Xos, Inc.
summary: Overview Xos, Inc., together with its wholly owned subsidiaries (collectively, the Company or Xos), aims to be the industrial accelerant for the modern energy era, transforming dated power infrastructures into easy-to-deploy solutions for todays rapidly changing needs. Xos offers a portfolio of power options, from flexible to fixed to fleet solutions.
